title: rubus fastigiatus
intro: Rubus fastigiatus, also known as the upright briar or upright raspberry, is a species of bramble in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus fastigiatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive system function. Rubus fastigiatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
